content:
Each project = a case study, method, or domain node
Each system = a field of study

---

### IV. BUSINESS / MONETIZATION FORMATS

All projects map to real-world usable formats and tools:

| Output Type | Format | Business Role |
|-------------|--------|----------------|
| **Narrative Projects** | Films, books, essays | Consumer media & IP |
| **Apps / Tools** | Software, plugins | B2B, niche creator tools |
| **Courses** | PDFs, classes | Ed-tech, Patreon, institutional use |
| **Archives** | Research sites, zines | Academic/collector value |
| **Templates** | Modular, remixable kits | Product shop & service assets |
| **Studios** | Service decks, consulting | Freelance + agency operations |

**Business Units:**
- `::ULTI.TOOL.MEDIA` → design, branding, client systems
